description: User scrolls through the home loan calculator options on the page.
User hovers over the 'Estimate refinance savings' link.
User clicks the 'Estimate refinance savings' link to open the calculator.
The page transitions to the Refinance calculator tool.
User pauses briefly over the 'Book appointment' button area before scrolling.
User scrolls down to reveal the 'My current loan' input section of the calculator.
User hovers near the 'Loan type' dropdown menu.
User pauses with the cursor at the top of the screen, possibly reviewing the page layout.
User performs a quick scroll up and down the page.
User pauses to examine the 'My current loan' section and its default values.
